title: zosima orientalis
intro: Zosima orientalis, also known as the sea lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the coastal regions of Europe and Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing stress and anxiety. Zosima orientalis is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
